overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person exploration of a futuristic dystopian city at sunset. The character walks along sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passes neon-lit megastructures, and crosses a busy intersection with steam vents and heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits covered area under overpass into open street with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, passing pedestrians and approaching the open street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and green shirt walking past the camera closely
green truck driving along the road in the same direction

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with support pillars overhead
gray concrete wall with red and black graffiti tags and street art
red and white street sign reading 'Crestmont' mounted on a pole
chain-link metal fence with diamond pattern along the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive highway overpass with the camera walking along a covered sidewalk. The concrete wall on the right features graffiti and a chain-link fence. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from under the overpass around the 6-second mark into the open street, revealing the megastructure building ahead and a green truck driving on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk alongside megastructure with digital advertising

events.description: passing street signs for Highway 101 and speed limit 40 while continuing along the building
approaching intersection with San Joaquin street sign and traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open sidewalk next to a massive building with glowing digital billboards and neon accents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with dark metal facade, red accent lighting, and large digital screens
elevated monorail track structure running parallel to the street
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying food items and 'The Big Show' text
street sign indicating 'Highway 101' mounted on a traffic pole
regulatory sign showing speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sidewalk in golden hour lighting, the camera passes the massive megastructure building covered in digital advertisements. The elevated monorail track runs parallel on the left. Street signs for Highway 101 and speed limit 40 are passed, followed by the San Joaquin intersection approach. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk while moderate traffic flows on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with crosswalks and industrial steam vents

events.description: turning left to cross the street at the intersection, transitioning from sidewalk to crosswalk
green truck and multiple cars passing through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and stopping at the intersection curb to observe the traffic and distant cityscape with steam vents

notable_agents.action: large green truck driving through the intersection from left to right
silver sedan crossing the intersection followed by other vehicles

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road
industrial building with large white steam vents emitting smoke into the air
large vertical billboard displaying 'VOTE' text with political imagery
tall cylindrical red-brick building with horizontal white stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to cross the street at the intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto the crosswalk. After crossing, it stops to observe the wide urban intersection. In the distance, a building emits large plumes of steam. Vehicles including a green truck and silver cars pass through the intersection. The monorail track now appears in the center background, and a tall red building stands prominently across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed confines of a highway overpass into a wide, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins by walking along a covered sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall and chain-link fence before emerging into the open street to reveal a towering megastructure and a passing green truck. As the camera continues forward in the golden hour light, the scene expands to show digital advertisements on the building and a parallel monorail track, passing street signs for Highway 101 and the San Joaquin intersection. The movement then shifts as the camera turns left to cross the street, moving from the sidewalk onto a crosswalk. Finally, the view opens up to a broad intersection where silver cars flow past a prominent red building and distant plumes of steam rise into the sky.
